REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (521 Liberty St., San Francisco, Ca 94114)
Off Calendar May-31-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Called with case no. 287942.Robert Wishner appearing for executor. Reappraisal for sale presented. Sale is for 100% interest with a 50% interest in each estate. Sale is confirmed at $1,161,500.00 for 100% interest. No bond is required. Counsel will prepare orders. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
